message:
ci: fix macOS bash ncurses dependency issue

Use 'brew reinstall ncurses bash' instead of 'brew install bash'
to ensure the ncurses library is properly linked when using
cached Homebrew installations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -84,7 +84,8 @@ jobs:
       - name: Install bash 5 (macOS)
         if: runner.os == 'macOS'
         run: |
-          brew install bash
+          # Reinstall bash and its dependencies to fix broken ncurses links
+          brew reinstall ncurses bash
           # Link bash to ensure it's available in PATH (may already be linked)
           brew link --overwrite bash 2>/dev/null || true
 
@@ -175,7 +176,8 @@ jobs:
       - name: Install bash 5 (macOS)
         if: runner.os == 'macOS'
         run: |
-          brew install bash
+          # Reinstall bash and its dependencies to fix broken ncurses links
+          brew reinstall ncurses bash
           # Link bash to ensure it's available in PATH (may already be linked)
           brew link --overwrite bash 2>/dev/null || true
